projects.title: School Information & News Website
projects.shortDescription: Comprehensive school management system with dynamic news publishing and administrative controls.
projects.fullDescription: A full-featured school information system designed to provide students, parents, and staff with real-time access to academic information, announcements, and school news. The platform features a powerful admin panel for content management and multi-level user authentication.
features: Dynamic news and announcement system with rich text editor
Academic calendar with event management
Student portal for grades and attendance tracking
Admin dashboard with role-based access control
Admissions management system with online application forms
Responsive design optimized for all devices
SEO-optimized content structure
Email notification system for important updates

highlights.challenge: Managing complex relationships between different user roles (students, teachers, admin) while maintaining data security and providing real-time updates.
highlights.solution: Implemented a robust role-based authentication system with JWT tokens and created a modular architecture that separates concerns between different user interfaces.
highlights.impact: Reduced administrative workload by 40% and improved parent-school communication efficiency by providing 24/7 access to student information and school updates.

projects.title: QR Attendance System
projects.shortDescription: Modern attendance tracking system using QR code technology with real-time notifications via email and SMS.
projects.fullDescription: An innovative attendance management solution that leverages QR code technology to streamline the check-in process. The system automatically generates unique QR codes for each session and sends instant notifications to stakeholders when attendance is recorded.
features: Automatic QR code generation for each attendance session
Real-time attendance tracking with timestamp verification
Dual notification system (Email + SMS)
Attendance analytics and reporting dashboard
Export functionality (PDF, Excel, CSV)
Multi-location support for distributed organizations
Attendance history with search and filter options
Anti-fraud measures with unique token validation

highlights.challenge: Ensuring accurate attendance records while preventing fraud attempts such as duplicate scans or unauthorized QR code sharing.
highlights.solution: Implemented time-sensitive QR codes that expire after each session and added GPS-based location verification to ensure physical presence at the designated location.
highlights.impact: Increased attendance tracking accuracy to 99.8% and reduced processing time from 15 minutes to under 2 minutes per session, serving 500+ daily users.

projects.title: Secure Voting System
projects.shortDescription: Enterprise-grade electronic voting platform with real-time results, comprehensive dashboard, and bank-level security.
projects.fullDescription: A highly secure digital voting platform designed for organizational elections. The system employs multiple layers of security including encryption, two-factor authentication, and blockchain-inspired verification to ensure vote integrity while maintaining voter anonymity.
features: End-to-end encrypted voting process
Two-factor authentication for voter verification
Real-time vote counting and results display
Comprehensive admin dashboard with analytics
Voter anonymity protection with encrypted ballot storage
Audit trail for transparency and verification
Multiple election support with different voting methods
Automated result calculation and reporting
Vote verification receipts without compromising anonymity
Session management with timeout protection

highlights.challenge: Balancing complete voter anonymity with the need for vote verification and audit capabilities while preventing any form of vote manipulation.
highlights.solution: Developed a unique encryption scheme where votes are encrypted with one-way hashing combined with randomized salt values. Implemented a separate verification system that allows voters to confirm their vote was counted without revealing their identity.
highlights.impact: Successfully conducted 15+ elections with 100% data integrity, zero security breaches, and 95% voter satisfaction rating. Reduced election costs by 70% compared to traditional paper-based systems.
